title: Level = Attributes
description: This datapack links each player's attributes to their current experience level.
body: # Level = Attributes¥nThis datapack links each player's attributes to their current experience level. Each time you gain or lose an experience level, your player's attributes will increase or decrease by a certain amount. This datapack also works on multiplayer servers!¥n¥n## Attributes¥nAttributes are values which dictate certain properties of mobs, specifically players for this datapack.¥n18 attributes are utilised in this datapack:¥n- `scale`¥n- `max_health`¥n- `max_absorption`¥n- `knockback_resistance`¥n- `movement_speed`¥n- `attack_damage`¥n- `armor`¥n- `armor_toughness`¥n- `step_height窶形¥n- `attack_speed`¥n- `luck`¥n- `block_interaction_range窶形¥n- `entity_interaction_range窶形¥n- `gravity`¥n- `safe_fall_distance`¥n- `fall_damage_multiplier`¥n- `block_break_speed`¥n- `jump_strength`¥n¥nYou can learn more about each attribute [here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Attribute).¥n¥n## Configuration¥nTo access the configuration scoreboard, run the command `/scoreboard objectives setdisplay sidebar level_attributes_config`. Here you can configure which attributes you want to enable/disable and set a custom max level. Do note that not all attributes are displayed on the scoreboard at once as there are too many attributes.¥n¥n![Level = Attribute scoreboard for config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae449e9d0cd753f79b41199fa7a5c1eece4119e2.png)¥n¥n### Enabling/disabling Attributes¥nEnabling an attribute links it to your current xp level while disabling unlinks it. All attributes are enabled by default.¥n¥nEnabling: `/scoreboard players set <attribute_name> level_attributes_config 1`¥¥¥nDisabling: `/scoreboard players set <attribute_name> level_attributes_config 0`¥n¥n### Setting Custom Max Level¥n`max_level` refers to the maximum xp level that each enabled attribute will scale towards. This means the higher the `max_level`, the slower each attribute increases towards its max value with each xp level gained. The default `max_level` is set to 1000. To customise it, run `/scoreboard players set max_level level_attributes_config <level>`. Valid values are integers between 10 and 1,000,000. Setting a value outside this range may break the datapack!¥n¥n## Other Things To Note...¥n- Run the command `/trigger level_attributes_list` to see the current values of all your player's attributes.¥n- If you want to remove the datapack, run the command `/function level_attributes:uninstall` and then disable/delete the datapack¥n¥n---¥nThis datapack was originally inspired by [Level = Border](https://modrinth.com/plugin/level-border) and the newly added attributes in Minecraft Snapshot [23w51a](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Java_Edition_23w51a#General:‾:text=it%20will%20unroll.-,General,-%5Bedit%20%7C).
